clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME] ("Provider") and [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") regarding [SERVICE_DESCRIPTION].

The Provider shall maintain the following measurable service levels for [SERVICE_DESCRIPTION]: availability of at least [UPTIME_TARGET_PERCENT], measured monthly, excluding periods defined in the Maintenance Windows Clause and events covered by the Force Majeure Clause.

Availability shall be calculated as the percentage of total minutes in the measurement period during which [SERVICE_DESCRIPTION] was accessible and functioning as intended, excluding Maintenance Windows.
The Provider shall acknowledge a reported issue with [SERVICE_DESCRIPTION] within [RESPONSE_TIME_TARGET], measured from the time the Client submits the issue through the agreed reporting channel.
The Provider shall use the Priority Matrix Clause to classify each reported issue and shall resolve it within the corresponding resolution time target defined for that priority level.
Reported issues shall be classified as [PRIORITY_LEVELS], each with a corresponding resolution time target of [RESOLUTION_TIME_BY_PRIORITY].

The Provider may perform scheduled maintenance during [MAINTENANCE_WINDOW_SCHEDULE]. Downtime occurring during a scheduled Maintenance Window does not count against the Performance Targets Clause, provided the Provider gives the Client at least [MAINTENANCE_NOTICE_PERIOD_HOURS] hours' advance notice.
If an issue is not resolved within the applicable Resolution Time Clause target, the Client may escalate the issue to [ESCALATION_CONTACT], who shall respond within [ESCALATION_RESPONSE_TIME].

If the Provider fails to meet the Performance Targets Clause in a given measurement period, the Client shall be entitled to a service credit calculated as [SERVICE_CREDIT_FORMULA], applied against the Client's next invoice.

If the Provider fails to meet the Performance Targets Clause in [CHRONIC_FAILURE_THRESHOLD] measurement periods within any [CHRONIC_FAILURE_WINDOW], the Client may terminate this Agreement for cause under the Termination Clause, in addition to any service credit due.

The Provider shall make performance data for [SERVICE_DESCRIPTION] available to the Client on a [REPORTING_FREQUENCY] basis, sufficient for the Client to verify compliance with the Performance Targets Clause.
The Client may terminate this Agreement under the conditions set out in the Chronic Failure Clause by giving written notice to the Provider.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to meet any service level to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
